name.ja: <ruby>球<rt>きゅう</rt></ruby><ruby>児<rt>じ</rt></ruby><ruby>皇<rt>おう</rt></ruby>オノマトピッチャー

requirement.en: "Feverous Spirit Stadium" is face-up on the field.

effect.en: Special Summon 1 Level 4 FIRE Attribute Warrior Type monster from your Graveyard to your field in face-up Defense Position. Then, you can add 1 Level 8 FIRE Attribute monster from your Graveyard to your hand. This turn, you cannot activate the effect of "Onomatopitcher".
